restriction: Do not scan, enumerate, access or ingest private cameras. Only use official public agency camera feeds or licensed CCTV feeds.
allowed_alternative: Official transport/port/weather/agency webcam APIs or licensed enterprise-owned camera streams.

restriction: Do not intercept private communications or restricted radio/signal content.
allowed_alternative: Public spectrum licence registries, official interference reports, lawful metadata from owned systems.

restriction: Do not scrape platforms where terms prohibit automated extraction.
allowed_alternative: Official APIs, licensed data providers, company registries, filings, LEI/GLEIF/OpenCorporates where permitted.

restriction: Do not seek classified, restricted, non-public or operationally sensitive defence telemetry.
allowed_alternative: Public registries, official defence publications, sanctions lists, procurement data, press releases.
